## Issue to Resolve

No spacing around colon in annotation
Spacing should not be allowed around the colon in annotation and annotation entries regardless of the annotation target

```
@file:JvmName("Foo") // allowed
@file :JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file: JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file : JvmName("Foo") // disallowed

@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting] // allowed
@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
```

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`

content.text:
Implemented enforcement of **no whitespace around `:` in annotations** (both `ANNOTATION` and `ANNOTATION_ENTRY` contexts).

### Changes made
- Updated `SpacingAroundColonRule` to:
  - report and autocorrect **unexpected whitespace before `:`** in annotations
  - report and autocorrect **unexpected whitespace after `:`** in annotations
  - apply regardless of annotation target (e.g. `@file:...`, `@set:[...]`, etc.)

### Added test
- New test file: `SpacingAroundColonRuleAnnotationSpacingTest.kt`
  - Verifies violations + autocorrection for:
    - `@file :JvmName("Foo")`, `@file: JvmName("Foo")`, `@file : JvmName("Foo")`
    - `@set :[Inject ...]`, `@set: [Inject ...]`, `@set : [Inject ...]`

Files changed/added:
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRuleAnnotationSpacingTest.kt`
